title: Systems Engineer AI Solutions
company_focus: Security compliance and trust management platform
description:
At Vanta, our mission is to help businesses earn and prove
trust. We believe that security should be monitored and
verified continuously, and we empower companies to practice
better security and prove it with ease. Vanta has a kind and
talented team, and while some have prior security
experience, many have been successful at Vanta without it.

In the role of Systems Engineer, AI Solutions on the
Corporate Engineering team, you will be responsible for
identifying, designing, and implementing AI-driven solutions
across General & Administrative (G&A) functions—including
People, Finance, Legal, IT, and Security—while also leading
company-wide, cross-functional AI initiatives that span
multiple teams.

This role partners closely with G&A leaders to improve
operational efficiency, reduce manual work, and enable
better decision-making through thoughtful AI adoption. In
parallel, you’ll collaborate with other AI-focused partners
to ensure internal AI solutions are aligned, reusable, and
scalable across the company.

What you’ll do as a Business Systems AI Solutions Lead at
Vanta:

- Partner with G&A teams (People, Finance, Legal, IT,
  Security) to identify high-impact opportunities for AI-
  driven improvements
- Analyze existing systems and workflows to uncover areas
  where AI can reduce toil, improve accuracy, or accelerate
  outcomes
- Design and implement AI-enabled solutions that align with
  functional needs and company standards
- Lead AI solutions that span multiple teams or apply broadly
  across the company (e.g., internal assistants, automation,
  intelligence layers)
- Help establish best practices and reusable patterns for
  internal AI development within Corporate Engineering
- Build and configure AI-driven solutions using a mix of
  declarative (clicks-based) tools and custom development
  (code)
- Integrate AI capabilities into existing internal systems
  while maintaining security, privacy, and data integrity
- Evaluate and recommend AI tools and platforms based on
  business impact, technical fit, and risk considerations
- Collaboration & Governance
- Translate business problems into technical solutions through
  close partnership with internal stakeholders
- Partner with Security, Legal, and IT to ensure AI solutions
  meet compliance, privacy, and governance requirements
- Balance experimentation and iteration with operational rigor
  and long-term maintainability

How to be successful in this role:

- Experience: 5+ years of experience in systems engineering,
  business systems, internal platforms, or related roles
- AI expertise: Strong understanding of AI technologies and
  their practical application in internal systems
- Systems thinking: Proven ability to design scalable,
  maintainable solutions across multiple tools and teams
- Build capability: Comfort working with both declarative
  configuration (clicks) and custom development (code)
- Problem-solving: Strong analytical skills to identify
  inefficiencies and apply thoughtful AI-driven improvements
- Ownership mindset: Ability to drive initiatives from concept
  through implementation with minimal oversight
- Collaboration: Excellent communication skills and ability to
  partner effectively across G&A and company-wide
  stakeholders
- Open to using AI to amplify their skills and strengthen
  their work - demonstrating curiosity, a willingness to
  learn, and sound judgment in applying AI responsibly to
  improve efficiency and impact.

What you can expect as a Vanta’n:

- Industry-competitive salary and equity
- Comprehensive medical, dental, and vision coverage, with
  100% of employee-only benefit premiums covered for most
  medical plans
- 16 weeks fully-paid Parental Leave for all new parents
- Health & wellness stipend
- Remote workspace, internet, and cellphone stipend
- Commuter benefits for team members who report to the SF and
  NYC office
- Family planning benefits
- Matching 401(k) contribution with immediate vesting
- Flexible PTO policy, plus 80 hours of Sick Time
- 11 company-paid holidays
- Virtual team building activities, lunch and learns, and
  other company-wide events!
- Offices in SF, NYC, London, Dublin, Tel Aviv, and Sydney

To provide greater transparency to candidates, we share base
pay ranges for all US-based job postings regardless of
state. We set standard base pay ranges for all roles based
on function, level, and country location, benchmarked
against similar-stage growth companies. Final offer amounts
are determined by multiple factors and may vary based on
candidate location, skills, depth of work experience, and
relevant licenses/credentials.

#LI-remote

At Vanta, we are committed to hiring diverse talent of
different backgrounds and as such, it is important to us to
provide an inclusive work environment for all. We do not
discriminate on the basis of race, gender identity, age,
religion, sexual orientation, veteran or disability status,
or any other protected class. As an equal opportunity
employer, we encourage and welcome people of all backgrounds
to apply.

About Vanta

We started in 2018, in the wake of several high-profile data
breaches. Online security was only becoming more important,
but we knew firsthand how hard it could be for fast-growing
companies to invest the time and manpower it takes to build
a solid security foundation. Vanta was inspired by a vision
to restore trust in internet businesses by enabling
companies to improve and prove their security. From our
early days automating security monitoring for compliance
standards like SOC 2, HIPAA and ISO 27001 to creating the
world's leading Trust Management Platform, our vision
remains unchanged.

Now more than ever, making security continuous—not just a
point-in-time check— is essential. Thousands of companies
rely on Vanta to build, maintain and demonstrate their
trust— all in a way that's real-time and transparent.

use_cases: Operational efficiency improvements for General & Administrative functions including People, Finance, Legal, IT, and Security
Internal AI assistants and automation tools to reduce manual work
Decision-making support systems through AI-driven insights and intelligence layers
Workflow optimization and toil reduction across cross-functional business processes
Security compliance and governance automation with AI capabilities
ai_classification_reasoning:
The role involves hands-on design and implementation of AI-
driven solutions, including internal assistants, automation,
and intelligence layers. The role requires building and
configuring AI solutions using both declarative tools and
custom code, and leading cross-functional AI initiatives
across the company.
